message:
fix: copy RuntimeConfig in normalizeRuntimeConfig to avoid mutating input

normalizeRuntimeConfig was modifying the input pointer in-place, so
callers like BuildCommand that stored configs in maps would have their
originals silently mutated. Now creates a shallow copy plus deep copies
of nested structs before applying defaults.

Fixes gt-6sxyo

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
